inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $14.747B minus capital spending $8.527B, divided by 3.528B weighted-average diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Filed free cash flow ~$1.76/sh; base uses $1.75/sh before heavy 2026 capex trough. Capex stress path ~$0.50/sh not in Lawrence base.

bear.notes: Auto price war, FSD option fails, capex with no payoff

base.notes: Energy storage ramp, auto volume stable, no robotaxi in base cash flow

bull.notes: Robotaxi or FSD subscription scale; energy margin expansion

segments.label: Automotive (sales, leasing, credits)
segments.evidence: FY2025 automotive revenue ~$78.5B; Q1 2026 automotive revenue $17.7B (10-Q); margin pressure vs 2022 peak

segments.label: Energy generation and storage
segments.evidence: FY2025 energy revenue ~$2.8B; segment growing faster than auto (10-K segment note)

options.label: Full Self-Driving / robotaxi software option
options.base_terminal_rationale: No SEC fair-value mark; pre-scale autonomy — explicit zero in Lawrence consolidated; overlay uses 12% base probability [Assumption]
options.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 FSD subscription revenue embedded in automotive; no robotaxi profit disclosure

options.label: Optimus humanoid robot
options.base_terminal_rationale: Pre-revenue R&D; no filing mark — explicit zero after option scan
options.evidence: R&D expense $6.4B FY2025 (10-K); Optimus not separately reported

corporate_drag.notes: Heavy capex above segment depreciation; AI training spend not fully in segment owner cash

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Manufacturing PP&E and leases on balance sheet; no land-at-zero pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant asset?
option_scan.evidence: Operating auto and energy factories; not royalty trust

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: R&D $6.4B FY2025 burdened in consolidated path; no separate loss segment in 10-K

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: FSD deferred revenue and robotaxi narrative not in Lawrence FCF0

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material holdco-style opaque sleeves in FY2025 10-K

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal recovery or royalty trust structure

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Regulatory credits and FSD subscription in automotive revenue (10-K)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Energy storage mix shift and cost curve; auto volume recovery; FSD/robotaxi excluded from Lawrence base growth
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: [Assumption] 6% years 1-5 on normalized $1.75/sh owner cash; energy segment faster in overlay

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
